csharpCode: using UnityEngine; public class Script : UnityEditor.Editor { public static string Main() { var monsters = FL.Gameplay.Modules.BigWorld.MonsterManager.Instance; if (monsters == null) return "MonsterManager null"; var sb = new System.Text.StringBuilder(); foreach (var pair in monsters.MonsterDic) { var ctrl = pair.Value; if (ctrl == null || ctrl.gameObject == null) continue; var npcData = ctrl.NpcData; if (npcData == null) continue; var animalExt = npcData.AnimalExt; if (animalExt == null) continue; if (animalExt.AnimalType != 1) continue; var pos = ctrl.gameObject.transform.position; sb.AppendLine($"Dog netId={ctrl.NetId} pos=({pos.x:F1},{pos.y:F1},{pos.z:F1}) state={npcData.BehaviorState}"); } return sb.Length > 0 ? sb.ToString() : "No dogs found"; } }
